claimText: Shinkansen is Japan's high-speed bullet train technology.
evidenceExcerpt: It is Japan's High-speed bullet train.
examUse: Statement-based question identifying the origin country of Shinkansen technology.

claimText: The Mumbai-Ahmedabad Bullet train project will utilize next-generation E10 Shinkansen trains.
evidenceExcerpt: Next generation E10 Shinkansen trains are to be introduced simultaneously in India (Mumbai-Ahmedabad Bullet train project) and Japan.
examUse: Statement-based question on the specific technology and train model used in India's first bullet train project.

claimText: Shinkansen technology utilizes dedicated tracks that are completely free of level crossings.
evidenceExcerpt: Dedicated track for high-speed rail that is free of level crossings
examUse: Statement-based question on the safety and infrastructure features of the Shinkansen system.

claimText: Shinkansen trains are equipped with an Automatic Train Control (ATC) system.
examUse: Statement-based question regarding the safety and control mechanisms of the Shinkansen.

claimText: Shinkansen trains incorporate aerodynamic optimization to reduce vehicle noise.
evidenceExcerpt: Includes aerodynamic optimization for vehicle noise reduction.
examUse: Statement-based question on the environmental and design features of Shinkansen trains.
distractorHooks: Acoustic barriers on tracks instead of train optimization
Aerodynamic optimization solely for speed enhancement
